results.summary: All mapping claims verified against the working tree. Every cited function exists at the stated location and the code satisfies the AC. All AC-required test scenarios have concrete test functions. No ACs are missing from the mapping; the one extra mapping row ('runPipeline() threads a.overlayDir into step 6') is implied by AC 2 threading requirement, not a phantom.

All 'implemented' claims hold up. Two advisory gaps: (1) TestInstallRepoContentOverlaySourceEmptyOverlayDir only exercises the branch where a base Source is also present — the branch where OverlaySource is set but Source is empty (content.go:154-158) has no test; (2) TestSettingsMaterializerCheckGitignoreWarning verifies no error but never captures stderr to assert the warning is actually emitted.

Round 1's blocking finding (import ordering relied on double-prepend coincidence instead of anchor insertion) is resolved by ba39a5b. The @workspace-context.md anchor is now present when the overlay import is injected, matching the PLAN's described mechanism. All other intent-level checks were correct in Round 1 and remain correct.
